content: Initial research note. Order book at Rs 5.6 lakh crore. Key risk: execution pace in infra segment. Defence and green energy verticals growing. Key catalyst: Project Lakshya delivery timelines.
Tejas Mk-1A ramp-up critical. Execution risk from supply chain and DRDO approvals. Long-term visibility exceptional given sovereign contracts.
Strong domestic + export defence electronics. Watch for: private sector competition in radar segment, export order wins, budget allocation.
